# External Debt Stocks (DOD, current US$) — Selected Countries by Year

| Country | 2019 | 2020 | 2021 | 2022 |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Argentina | 278,400,000,000 | 271,900,000,000 | 286,200,000,000 | 298,700,000,000 |
| Brazil | 641,100,000,000 | 670,800,000,000 | 695,500,000,000 | 724,300,000,000 |
| Egypt | 112,600,000,000 | 129,200,000,000 | 145,900,000,000 | 162,400,000,000 |
| India | 558,100,000,000 | 568,700,000,000 | 615,000,000,000 | 624,900,000,000 |
| Indonesia | 402,200,000,000 | 417,500,000,000 | 427,800,000,000 | 409,600,000,000 |
| Kenya | 61,900,000,000 | 69,800,000,000 | 74,600,000,000 | 79,300,000,000 |
| Vietnam | 176,400,000,000 | 189,700,000,000 | 199,100,000,000 | 210,800,000,000 |
